# Matt Jared

> Sales Leader & Web Developer in Austin, Texas

Matt Jared is a marketer turned self-taught developer turned sales engineer turned sales leader. He has worked at and alongside startups and scale-ups including Cratejoy, Techstars, Atlassian, and Vercel, where he leads sales and field engineering efforts to help teams ship faster websites with happier teams.

He is deeply interested in the intersection of engineering, business, and go-to-market — especially sales, positioning, and distribution when technical credibility is what creates trust.

On the code side, Matt works with Next.js, React, Postgres, and Supabase. More broadly, he builds products, teams, projects, and companies and shares what he learns along the way.

## Links

- Blog: /blog
- Contact: available via the contact form on the homepage
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/mattjared
- GitHub: github.com/mattjared

## Projects

- Void: A chrome extension for taking notes and focus
- Emoji Text: A tiny site to write slack messages in slack emoji quickly
- Scorelord: Full stack app to track daily scores and post to Slack
- Random Hooper: An API to generate random NBA player names
- How much is 10mb?: A site pushing the limits of what can go into 10mb
- Server Side Football Site: Using SSR to display English Soccer team data
- Client Side Football Site: Using CSR to display English Soccer team data
- Football Clubs API: Supabase + Next.js with all Wikipedia data showing English soccer teams
- Next in line: Hype site for pre launch startups and drops
- Next.js AI Lite: Minimal AI chatbot start built with Next.js
- NBA Colors: Package with NBA colors
- Homepage GPT: v0 but homemade
- Bingeboard: Greatest quotes from the Binge Mode podcast on a soundboard
